Name: FACE_EDIT_PARAM_MONTAGE_CAMERA
Description: Defines camera positioning and viewing settings used during facial editing montage or character customization scenes.

Fields.Name: Field of View
Fields.Description: Camera field of view angle used during the face editing montage.

Fields.Name: Camera Focus: X
Fields.Description: X-axis coordinate of the camera focus target.

Fields.Name: Camera Focus: Y
Fields.Description: Y-axis coordinate of the camera focus target.

Fields.Name: Camera Focus: Z
Fields.Description: Z-axis coordinate of the camera focus target.
